name: Sunjang Baduk
author: Abstract Games factory
description: The historical Korean form of Go, played until ~1950: a fixed 17-stone opening setup (8 White, 8 Black on the marked guard points, plus Black's prescribed tengen stone), White moves first, and Korean removal counting — interior stones are stripped down to the minimal boundary walls and only the empty territory points count (prisoners ignored, stones do not score). In-game rules are ordinary Go.
